name: I fell from ladder at work but feel fine now, should I still see doctor?
description: Yes, see doctor now—hidden injuries common.

mainEntity.name: I fell from ladder at work but feel fine now, should I still see doctor?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, see doctor now—hidden injuries common.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, get checked immediately** even if no pain—internal injuries like herniations develop later.[3][1]

Insurance blames delayed care for worsening; records protect claim.[3]

- ER or urgent care first.
- Follow-up with specialist.
- Log all symptoms daily.

Better safe; strengthens workers' comp.
